Task: "Read my last 5 Gmail emails and summarize them"
Reward: 0.70
Success: true

  📧 gmail
  📁 drive
  📅 calendar
  📄 docs
  📊 sheets

   Date: 20/2/2

From: Google <no-reply@accounts.google.com>
To: devanyae
4. gmail_read({"message_id":"19c7a41eb1c52c06"}) → Subject: Security alert
From: Google <no-reply@accounts.google.com>
To: devanyae
5. gmail_read({"message_id":"19c7a41e65e3675d"}) → Subject: Your Google Account was recovered successfully
From: Google <no-reply@a

From: Google <noreply@google.com>
To: devanyae

From: Google <no-reply@accounts.google.co

entries.text:
Task: Check the current weather in New York. If it's raining, set a reminder to bring an umbrella. If it's sunny, set a reminder to pack sunglasses.
Reward: 0.60
Success: true
Steps:
1. google_status({}) → ✅ Google connected!

  📧 gmail
  📁 drive
  📅 calendar
  📄 docs
  📊 sheets
 
2. adb_app_launch({"package":"com.brave.browser"}) → Launched com.brave.browser. Wait a moment then use adb_ui_tree or adb_screenshot
3. adb_wait({"ms":2000}) → Waited 2000ms.
4. adb_ui_tree({"max_elements":200}) → UI Tree (19 of 19 elements):

[0] FrameLayout id=content bounds=[0,55][720,1449]
5. adb_tap({"x":310,"y":111}) → Tapped at (310, 111) successfully.
6. adb_type({"clear_first":true,"text":"New York weather"}) → Typed "New York weather" (cleared field first).
7. adb_key({"key":"ENTER"}) → Pressed ENTER (keycode 66).
8. adb_wait({"ms":2000}) → Waited 2000ms.
9. adb_ui_tree({"max_elements":200}) → UI Tree (98 of 98 elements):

[0] FrameLayout id=content bounds=[0,55][720,1449]
10. calendar_create({"title":"Pack sunglasses","start_time":"2026-02-22T08:00:00","end_time":"2026-02-22T09:00:00","atte) → ✅ Event created: Pack sunglasses
https://www.google.com/calendar/event?eid=OGs1d
Insight: Successfully completed using adb_wait(×2), adb_ui_tree(×2), google_status(×1) (reward=0.60, 10 steps, 71.7s)
